reviews.review_description: What a pile of crap. Worst game i have played up to date. Nothing moves its about as imersive as. Dont waste your money.
Doest work at all
Still shot 360 images with arrows showing transition points.

I think it is a tad expensive. Beat it in maybe 2 hours?  Thought there would be more steps, wish I hadn't watched a youtube review as even 1 solve spoiler takes away from a chunk of playtime. 

Found navigation and visuals perfect. Game dings on interactive objects or it would be impossible.  

If it was any harder I would likely have never finished it, so they got that right. 

I will play it again. 

I would buy another game like this.  Hint hint.
How to get refund
I heard all this hype and bought it. I solved it in 1 1/2 hours. It was a waste of money
Please do not buy this game I just bought a couple days ago it is the most boring game I ever played...
I wish you could walk around on this one. Will be fun for some.

I attempted top download this app after purchasing it and I could not.  I liked the idea of being able to use offline, and now I can't use it at all. I attempted to get my money back, but that's not even an option. Captain, more like Pirates.

It's not all bad for a 360 point & click, but the minimal interactions and mediocre scene development fail to keep things interesting. In my opinion it's seriously underdeveloped and not worth anywhere near the asking price...regretted by purchase pretty quickly.
I've been walking around, but I just don't know what I need to do. All that walking got me sick :(

This game doesn't hold your hand at all. There are no hints beyond him talking when you click on things. As others have said, it's a bit frustrating that you can't pick items up until you need them, but also kinda more realistic that way. The trouble is there are lots of times when you just don't know what to do and you wind up just tapping everywhere hoping to find something. Having the cross hair change colour when on top of something interactive would have been nice. Pretty sure this is a series of stereoscopic 360 images and not real-time rendered scenes. It looks a bit strange at first, but once you get used to it it's pretty immersive. This game reminds me of my childhood where I would often get stuck for days not knowing what to do next, but there is a thrill when you discover it. That has largely been lost in modern games where they just give you the answer if they think you're having trouble, or worse, while explaining the puzzle. I think it's worth the price.

In my opinion this game is one of the smartest that you can find on GearVR. It's a great adventure (more than 3 hours to finish it for me) with stunning visuals for mobile VR and cool puzzles. It requires reflexion and memory to win, and it's cool :) Reminds me the greatest 90's point and clicks.
Good graphics

Really good game. The adventure Games is so rarely. The phone stay cold and you can play 2h with no stop. One Games of the winner offre Oculus jam. I am happy to play. Its the first game i have finished.
Maybe it because of the description,  enthralling? Not so much, point and click static 360 images.  It didn't feel immersive, nor intuitive.  And the price,  ouch.
I'm concerned that overpriced and underwhelming VR experiences like this do more harm than good.

Great game! I've been waiting for this game to come out for awhile and was happy to see it released.  Reminds me of Myst, and I found myself loosing track of time when I played it.  A definite must have for the Gear VR.

Enjoying it so far, but wish the landscape were a little more varied, if only to give you a proper indication of where you are. Also hate that I can't pick up objects until I "need" them. Half the fun of this type of game is picking things up and using them as needed. Reserving judgment until I finish, but not terribly impressed so far.
Long awaited. An immersive experience in a beautifull island.
